week.name: Unlimited-OCR
week.description: Unlimited OCR Works: Welcome the Era of One-shot Long-horizon Parsing.
week.features: A Python-based framework designed for one-shot, long-horizon text parsing. It leverages advanced OCR capabilities to process complex documents effectively.
week.applications: Ideal for developers and enterprises needing robust, large-scale document analysis and automated data extraction.

week.name: Cowart
week.features: A JavaScript project with minimal documentation available. It serves as a base repository for custom web-based implementations.
week.applications: Likely used for experimental web development or niche automation tasks requiring JavaScript integration.

week.name: zhengxi-views
week.description: 可溯源的郑希(易方达基金经理)投研 Agent Skill——基于他全部公开观点原文 + 有原话佐证的投资方法 + 全市场基金真实数据，能溯源问答、按他框架给基金打分，绝不杜撰。⚠️仅研究学习辅助，不构成投资建议‼️website是郑希主页！
week.features: An AI agent trained on the public views and investment methodologies of fund manager Zhengxi. It provides traceable, evidence-based answers and fund scoring based on real market data.
week.applications: Useful for financial researchers and investors seeking to analyze fund performance through the perspective of a specific professional framework.

week.name: agent-apprenticeship
week.description: The living ecosystem where AI agents learn from real-world work through iterative workflow loops, reusable experience, and collective training signal exchange.
week.features: A collaborative ecosystem for AI agents to learn through iterative workflows and experience sharing. It facilitates collective training signal exchange to improve agent performance over time.
week.applications: Designed for AI engineers looking to build self-improving agentic workflows that adapt to real-world tasks.

week.name: codex-orange-book
week.description: Codex 橙皮书：从安装到实战案例的全链路 Codex 使用指南（非官方开源，含可下载 PDF）
week.features: A comprehensive, community-driven guide for the Codex coding assistant, covering everything from installation to practical real-world usage. It is available in multiple formats, including a downloadable PDF.
week.applications: Best for developers looking to master the Codex tool with a structured learning path.

week.name: cnfast
week.features: A high-performance TypeScript utility serving as a faster, drop-in replacement for the common 'cn' function in tailwind-merge setups. It optimizes class name string manipulation.
week.applications: Useful for frontend developers wanting to reduce bundle sizes and improve build performance in React projects.

week.name: birds.cafe
week.features: A JavaScript-based web application with unspecified core functionality. It typically serves as a social or media-focused web platform.
week.applications: Could be used for community engagement or content sharing platforms.

week.name: Windows-Copilot-API
week.description: Reverse engineered Windows Copilot into an OpenAI-compatible API. Access GPT-4 and GPT-5 models through a simple REST interface without API keys or billing.
week.features: A reverse-engineered interface that provides an OpenAI-compatible API for Windows Copilot. It allows access to advanced models like GPT-4 via a REST interface without needing individual API keys.
week.applications: Ideal for developers who want to integrate Windows Copilot intelligence into existing applications without incurring separate costs.

week.name: security-audit-skill
week.description: A coding-agent skill for multi-phase security audits with independently verified, machine-readable findings
week.features: A specialized skill set for coding agents to perform multi-phase security audits. It generates machine-readable, independently verified security findings.
week.applications: Essential for security engineers and automated CI/CD pipelines to proactively detect vulnerabilities in codebase updates.

week.name: junction
week.description: VS Code chat sidebar for local AI coding agents
week.features: A VS Code extension that provides a dedicated chat sidebar for local AI coding agents. It streamlines the interaction between developers and AI models directly within the editor.
week.applications: Designed for developers seeking a more efficient and integrated workflow when using local LLMs for coding assistance.

week.name: Good-Badminton
week.features: An AI-powered computer vision system designed for badminton match analysis, acting as a 'Hawk-Eye' to track shuttlecock movement and court positioning.
week.applications: Useful for sports analysts, trainers, and amateur players to review performance and analyze referee-style line calls.

week.name: recall
week.description: Stop wasting tokens and re-explaining your project every session. Recall gives Claude Code durable memory — entirely offline.
week.features: A Python tool that gives Claude Code persistent, offline memory across sessions. It helps prevent token waste and the need to repeatedly re-explain project context.
week.applications: Perfect for power users of Claude Code who work on long-term, complex projects and need context continuity.

month.name: odysseus

license.name: GNU Affero General Public License v3.0

month.features: A self-hosted AI workspace environment designed for local management. It allows users to maintain control over their data and AI processing tasks.
month.applications: Ideal for developers and privacy-conscious users who want to host their own AI-driven productivity tools locally.

month.name: ponytail
month.description: Makes your AI agent think like the laziest senior dev in the room. The best code is the code you never wrote.
month.features: An AI agent framework that prioritizes minimalism and efficiency in software development. It encourages developers to write the least amount of code necessary by automating routine tasks.
month.applications: Used by senior developers who want to streamline their workflow and minimize maintenance overhead by avoiding unnecessary code bloat.

month.name: MiMo-Code
month.description: MiMo Code: Where Models and Agents Co-Evolve
month.features: A collaborative platform where AI models and autonomous agents evolve together. It focuses on the synergy between model intelligence and agentic workflows.
month.applications: Suitable for researchers and developers exploring the future of autonomous software engineering and evolving AI systems.

month.name: book
month.description: The canonical reference for Astrid OS: kernel, capsules, host ABI, the bus, and the security model.
month.features: Acts as the definitive technical reference for the Astrid operating system. It covers the kernel architecture, capsule systems, host ABI, and internal security models.
month.applications: Essential documentation for kernel developers and system engineers building or contributing to the Astrid OS ecosystem.

month.name: handbook
month.description: How to work on Astrid: the polyrepo, the kernel-is-dumb law, the RFC trigger, contribution tiers, and the release process.
month.features: Provides comprehensive procedural guidelines for contributing to the Astrid project. It outlines project governance, RFC processes, and release cycles.
month.applications: Intended for contributors and project maintainers to ensure smooth collaboration and adherence to project-wide standards.

month.name: improve
month.description: Use your most capable model to audit your codebase and write plans for cheaper models to execute.
month.features: Utilizes high-performance AI models to audit existing codebases and generate actionable execution plans. It then delegates the implementation of these plans to more cost-effective models.
month.applications: Ideal for teams looking to optimize their development costs and improve code quality through AI-driven auditing.

month.name: ian-xiaohei-illustrations
month.description: 中文小黑怪诞正文配图生成 Skill | 16:9 白底手绘 | 少量红橙蓝批注 | Codex Skill
month.features: A specialized skill for generating quirky, hand-drawn illustrations with specific color accents in a 16:9 format. It is designed to integrate with Codex-based workflows.
month.applications: Useful for content creators and designers who need rapid, stylized illustrative assets for social media or digital content.

month.name: chinese-buy-us-stock-guide
month.features: A comprehensive guide detailing the procedures and requirements for investing in US stocks from a Chinese perspective. It consolidates regulatory information and platform advice.
month.applications: Designed for individual investors in China seeking clear, structured guidance on navigating the US stock market.

month.name: PixelRAG
month.description: The end of web parsing. The beginning of scalable pixel-native search.
month.features: Replaces traditional web parsing with a scalable, pixel-native search approach. It treats visual information directly to enhance the accuracy of data retrieval.
month.applications: Perfect for applications that struggle with messy HTML parsing and require high-fidelity data extraction from complex visual interfaces.

month.name: Unlimited-OCR
month.description: Unlimited OCR Works: Welcome the Era of One-shot Long-horizon Parsing.
month.features: A powerful OCR engine optimized for one-shot, long-horizon text parsing. It enables the extraction of complex information from long documents in a single pass.
month.applications: Targeted at enterprises and developers processing vast amounts of long-form documents who require high-efficiency and low-latency OCR.

month.name: omnigent
month.description: Omnigent is an open-source AI agent framework and meta-harness: orchestrate Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Pi, and custom agents — swap harnesses without rewriting, enforce policies and sandboxing, and collaborate in real time from any device.
month.features: An open-source meta-harness for AI agents that allows orchestration across multiple platforms like Claude Code, Cursor, and Codex. It supports policy enforcement, sandboxing, and real-time collaboration.
month.applications: Provides a unified control layer for development teams needing to switch between different AI agent tools without rewriting their entire automation stack.

month.name: guizang-social-card-skill
month.description: 🪧 Claude Code / Codex skill — generate Xiaohongshu carousels & WeChat 21:9+1:1 cover pairs. Editorial × Swiss visual systems, 28 layouts, 10 themes, single-file HTML → PNG. 小红书图文 + 公众号封面对

license.name: GNU Affero General Public License v3.0

month.features: A skill for generating professional social media graphics, including Xiaohongshu carousels and WeChat cover images. It uses Swiss-inspired visual design and converts HTML/CSS layouts to PNG.
month.applications: Great for content creators and social media managers who want to automate the creation of high-quality, branded visual content.

three_months.name: claw-code

three_months.features: An agent-managed project framework built with Rust that operates autonomously. It leverages advanced coding logic to maintain software without human intervention.
three_months.applications: Ideal for projects requiring continuous autonomous maintenance and self-managing museum-style digital exhibits.

three_months.name: awesome-design-md
three_months.description: A collection of DESIGN.md files analysis by popular brand design systems. Drop one into your project and let coding agents generate a matching UI.
three_months.features: A curated repository of DESIGN.md files derived from top-tier brand design systems. It enables coding agents to parse these files and generate consistent, brand-aligned UI components.
three_months.applications: Useful for developers and designers who want to automate UI consistency across projects by providing agents with structured design standards.

three_months.name: odysseus

license.name: GNU Affero General Public License v3.0

three_months.features: A self-hosted, private AI workspace solution. It provides users with full control over their AI development environment and data privacy.
three_months.applications: Best suited for developers who require a secure, self-hosted environment for AI-assisted coding and project management.

three_months.name: caveman
three_months.description: 🪨 why use many token when few token do trick — Claude Code skill that cuts 65% of tokens by talking like caveman
three_months.features: A specialized skill for Claude Code that optimizes token usage by utilizing extremely concise, caveman-like language. This approach reportedly cuts token consumption by 65%.
three_months.applications: Highly effective for teams or individuals looking to significantly reduce API costs and token overhead in AI-driven development workflows.

three_months.name: graphify
three_months.description: AI coding assistant skill (Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Cursor, Gemini CLI, and more). Turn any folder of code, SQL schemas, R scripts, shell scripts, docs, papers, images, or videos into a queryable knowledge graph. App code + database schema + infrastructure in one graph.
three_months.features: A versatile AI coding assistant skill that transforms diverse project assets into a unified, queryable knowledge graph. It integrates code, databases, documentation, and media into one relational structure.
three_months.applications: Helps developers and architects visualize complex project structures and perform advanced cross-file, cross-schema technical queries.

three_months.name: open-design
three_months.description: 🎨 Local-first, open-source Claude Design alternative. 🖥️ Native desktop app. ⚡ 259+ Skills · ✨ 142+ Design Systems 🖼️ Web · desktop · mobile prototypes · slides · images · videos · HyperFrames 📦 Sandboxed preview · HTML/PDF/PPTX/MP4 export 🤖 Claude Code / OpenClaw / Codex / Cursor / OpenCode / Qwen / Copilot / Hermes / Kimi & 17+ CLIs.
three_months.features: A local-first, open-source desktop application that serves as an alternative to Claude Design. It supports a massive library of design systems and integrates with numerous CLIs and AI models for prototyping.
three_months.applications: Designed for product designers and developers who need a robust, privacy-focused, and highly extensible tool for rapid prototyping and design exports.

three_months.name: mempalace
three_months.description: The best-benchmarked open-source AI memory system. And it's free.
three_months.features: A highly optimized, open-source memory system built for AI applications. It focuses on performance benchmarking to ensure efficient long-term state management.
three_months.applications: Suitable for AI developers aiming to integrate reliable, high-performance long-term memory capabilities into their agentic workflows.

three_months.name: career-ops
three_months.description: AI-powered job search system built on Claude Code. 14 skill modes, Go dashboard, PDF generation, batch processing.
three_months.features: An AI-powered job search system integrated with Claude Code featuring 14 distinct skill modes. It includes a Go-based dashboard and supports automated PDF generation and batch processing.
three_months.applications: Perfect for job seekers who want to automate the application process, from tracking listings to generating and sending personalized documents.

three_months.name: ponytail
three_months.description: Makes your AI agent think like the laziest senior dev in the room. The best code is the code you never wrote.
three_months.features: A unique AI agent utility that mimics the perspective of a 'lazy senior developer.' It prioritizes extreme code efficiency and minimalism to avoid unnecessary implementation.
three_months.applications: Useful for developers who want to prevent over-engineering and focus on writing only the most essential code required for a feature.

three_months.name: openclaude
three_months.features: A portable and highly adaptable project designed to run in any environment. Its architecture is built for maximum flexibility, allowing it to leverage a wide range of external tools and models.
three_months.applications: Provides a versatile foundation for developers who need a cross-platform, agnostic AI coding assistant.

three_months.name: nuwa-skill
three_months.description: 你想蒸馏的下一个员工，何必是同事。蒸馏任何人的思维方式——心智模型、决策启发式、表达DNA。Distill how anyone thinks.
three_months.features: A tool designed to distill the cognitive processes, decision-making heuristics, and mental models of any individual. It captures the 'DNA' of how a person thinks for AI replication.
three_months.applications: Useful for professionals and teams looking to preserve internal expertise or create 'digital twins' of expert thinking patterns for training and decision support.

three_months.name: DeepSeek-Reasonix
three_months.description: DeepSeek-native AI coding agent for your terminal. Engineered around prefix-cache stability — leave it running.
three_months.features: A terminal-based AI coding agent native to the DeepSeek model. It is specifically engineered for high stability using prefix-caching, allowing for reliable long-running sessions.
three_months.applications: Ideal for power users who spend their development cycle in the terminal and need a stable, persistent AI coding companion.

year.name: openclaw
year.description: Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞
year.features: OpenClaw is a personal AI assistant designed to function across any operating system or platform. It emphasizes a cross-platform, lobster-themed approach to modular AI assistance.
year.applications: It is ideal for users seeking a unified, platform-agnostic AI agent to streamline tasks across different environments.

year.name: superpowers
year.description: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.
year.features: Superpowers provides a robust framework and methodology for agentic skills. It focuses on structured software development processes for managing AI agents.
year.applications: It is intended for developers looking to implement repeatable, agent-driven workflows and methodologies in their software projects.

year.name: ECC
year.description: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.
year.features: ECC is a performance optimization system for agent harnesses, focusing on memory, security, and research-first development. It integrates seamlessly with platforms like Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor.
year.applications: It is used by engineers to improve the responsiveness, security, and intellectual performance of their AI coding agents.

year.name: hermes-agent
year.description: The agent that grows with you
year.features: Hermes Agent is an evolving AI agent designed for continuous learning and adaptation. It is built to grow and improve alongside the user's requirements.
year.applications: Suitable for users who need an evolving assistant that adapts its behaviors over time to match specific task complexity and user habits.

year.name: claw-code
year.description: An agent-managed museum exhibit, built in Rust with Gajae-Code / LazyCodex — developed and maintained with no human intervention.
year.features: Claw-Code is an agent-managed system built in Rust that facilitates autonomous development. It operates as a self-maintaining exhibit, requiring no human intervention for upkeep.
year.applications: It serves as a demonstration of autonomous, self-sustaining AI agent systems in software maintenance and creation.

year.name: andrej-karpathy-skills
year.description: A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls.
year.features: This project utilizes a structured CLAUDE.md file to refine the behavior of Claude Code. It incorporates insights from Andrej Karpathy regarding common LLM coding pitfalls.
year.applications: Developers can use this configuration to significantly reduce AI coding hallucinations and improve the quality of generated code outputs.

year.name: skills
year.features: This is a public, open-source repository maintained by Anthropic for sharing agent skills. It provides standardized capabilities for various agentic workflows.
year.applications: Developers can pull from this library to equip their AI agents with proven, reliable capabilities for complex task execution.

year.name: skills
year.description: Skills for Real Engineers. Straight from my .claude directory.
year.features: This repository hosts specific, opinionated skills for engineers directly from Matt Pocock's development environment. It focuses on practical, real-world utility for AI assistants.
year.applications: Professional software engineers can adopt these tools to enhance their daily productivity when working with AI-integrated development workflows.

year.name: agency-agents
year.description: A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.
year.features: This project offers a comprehensive suite of specialized agents, ranging from frontend developers to reality checkers. Each agent is designed with specific processes, personalities, and delivery standards.
year.applications: It allows users to assemble a full-scale 'AI agency' to manage multiple aspects of a project simultaneously.

year.name: spec-kit
year.description: 💫 Toolkit to help you get started with Spec-Driven Development
year.features: Spec-Kit is a toolkit designed to facilitate spec-driven development. It helps developers generate and manage technical specifications to guide AI-led coding.
year.applications: Useful for engineering teams that want to ensure their AI agents adhere to strict architectural and functional specifications.

year.name: gstack
year.description: Use Garry Tan's exact Claude Code setup: 23 opinionated tools that serve as CEO, Designer, Eng Manager, Release Manager, Doc Engineer, and QA
year.features: GStack implements Garry Tan's opinionated setup for Claude Code, featuring 23 specialized tools. These tools emulate various roles, including CEO, Designer, and Release Manager.
year.applications: Ideal for solopreneurs or startup founders who want to utilize a highly structured, role-based AI delegation system.

year.name: cc-switch
year.description: A cross-platform desktop All-in-One assistant for Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, OpenClaw, Gemini CLI & Hermes Agent. Only official website: ccswitch.io
year.features: CC-Switch is a cross-platform desktop manager that centralizes access to multiple AI tools like Claude Code, Codex, and Hermes Agent. It provides an all-in-one interface for various CLI-based assistants.
year.applications: It is perfect for power users who frequently switch between different AI coding tools and need a unified management interface.

audio_video.name: graphify

Turn any folder of code, SQL schemas, R scripts, shell scripts, docs, papers, images, or videos into a queryable knowledge graph. App code + database schema + infrastructure in one graph.

It integrates seamlessly with major AI coding assistants like Claude Code and Cursor to provide deep, contextual understanding of projects.
audio_video.applications: Ideal for software developers and data engineers who need to quickly query, visualize, and understand complex relationships within large codebases and infrastructure.

audio_video.name: open-design
audio_video.description: 🎨 Local-first, open-source Claude Design alternative. 🖥️ Native desktop app. ⚡ 259+ Skills · ✨ 142+ Design Systems 🖼️ Web · desktop · mobile prototypes · slides · images · videos · HyperFrames 📦 Sandboxed preview · HTML/PDF/PPTX/MP4 export 🤖 Claude Code / OpenClaw / Codex / Cursor / OpenCode / Qwen / Copilot / Hermes / Kimi & 17+ CLIs.

audio_video.name: reclip
audio_video.description: Download videos from almost any website. Lightweight, self-hosted media downloader with a clean web UI.
audio_video.features: A lightweight, self-hosted media downloader that features a clean, simple web interface. It allows users to easily download video content from almost any website.
audio_video.applications: Perfect for users who need a private and reliable way to archive or download web media without intrusive advertisements or complex software.

audio_video.name: MOSS-TTS-Nano
audio_video.description: MOSS-TTS-Nano is an open-source multilingual tiny speech generation model from MOSI.AI and the OpenMOSS team. With only 0.1B parameters, it is designed for realtime speech generation, can run directly on CPU without a GPU, and keeps the deployment stack simple enough for local demos, web serving, and lightweight product integration.
audio_video.features: A tiny, 0.1B parameter multilingual speech generation model designed for high-performance, real-time CPU execution. Its architecture is optimized for low-resource environments and rapid product integration.
audio_video.applications: Well-suited for edge computing, local demos, and lightweight mobile applications that require instant, on-device voice generation.

audio_video.name: html-video
audio_video.description: Programmatic video for coding agents — HTML to video on your laptop. Turn HTML, CSS & data into real MP4s with pluggable render engines, 21 templates, AI soundtrack. Apache-2.0, no per-render fees. An official project by the Open Design team.
audio_video.features: A programmatic video rendering engine that converts HTML, CSS, and data into high-quality MP4 files. It supports multiple render engines, pre-built templates, and AI soundtrack integration with no per-render costs.
audio_video.applications: Ideal for automated marketing, personalized video generation, and developers needing to generate dynamic video content programmatically.

audio_video.name: MisoTTS
audio_video.description: Miso TTS is an 8 billion, highly emotive text-to-speech model
audio_video.features: A powerful 8-billion parameter text-to-speech model that emphasizes highly expressive and emotive speech patterns. It delivers a natural, human-like cadence suitable for storytelling and conversational agents.
audio_video.applications: Great for game developers, audiobook creators, and interactive AI applications requiring high-emotional-intelligence voice synthesis.

audio_video.name: openless
audio_video.description: Hold a key, speak, release — AI-polished text appears at your cursor in any app. Open-source voice input for macOS & Windows. (按住快捷键说话，松开即得润色后的文字)
audio_video.features: An open-source voice input tool that captures voice and replaces it with AI-polished text at the user's cursor. It works across both macOS and Windows platforms with a simple hold-to-speak interface.
audio_video.applications: Designed for professionals and writers who want to boost productivity by quickly dictating and refining their thoughts into any text-based application.
